summary: Completed testing of Search page, Dark mode header fix, and Service Worker offline caching. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/search?q=gospel - returns courses (1), lessons (1), discussions (1) with correct structure
GET /api/search?q=genesis - returns course result for Genesis
GET /api/search requires query parameter (returns 422 without q param)
GET /api/search?q=xyznonexistent - returns empty arrays for no matches
Search discussion results include user_name field
Member user can access search endpoint
Frontend: /search page loads with search input and empty state
Frontend: /search page - searching for 'gospel' shows 3 results (1 course, 1 lesson, 1 discussion)
Frontend: /search page - clicking course result navigates to /courses/{id}
Frontend: Navigation bar includes Search link for all users (teacher and member)
Frontend: Dark mode toggle in /settings adds 'dark' class to HTML element
Frontend: Header background changes to rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.9) in dark mode (gray-900/90)
Frontend: Layout header has dark:bg-gray-900/90 class (verified in DOM)
Frontend: Service Worker sw.js is registered and active at /sw.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Search page fully working: /search route loads with search input, empty state shows initially, searching returns categorized results (courses, lessons, discussions), clicking results navigates to detail pages. Dark mode header fix confirmed working - header background changes from white to gray-900 in dark mode. Service Worker is registered and handles offline caching for static assets and API responses. The SearchBar component that previously crashed was replaced with a standalone /search page using simple React patterns to avoid Babel plugin issues.
